title: Refined Cats
description: Updates the cat textures as well as the model to have a refreshed appearance  (Forge/Fabric)
body:
![all default variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b1ae7de1c762d5cc79eec247cdd7ee7573a6017.jpeg)

![refined cats banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b9c45d4c66396f9b843c8f2b6cdd7d77e157ce8.png)

![the mods etf and emf are required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a985c50fef6919cf029a83f272d8e2d71400524e_0.webp)

## THESE MODS ARE REQUIRED FOR REFINED CATS TO WORK:

1. [ETF] Entity Texture Features 

2. [EMF] Entity Model Features

![Nametag variants case insensitive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cecf5531e28fa8466e40d44917928881a268d781_0.webp)

**Refined Cats: Detailed replaces the default cat with a custom model and brand new textures**

There is currently 24 textures, most of which are variations of the default cat breeds. There may be more breeds coming in the future! Refined Cats is **compatible with Forge/Fabric**

![maine coon kitten](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a0fb115f87e026bc8b048651581d93d84b028ea.png)

**_Report any bugs or issues on github!_**
